ResearchProjectDef.label: gene serums
ResearchProjectDef.description: Build a serum lab and brew injectable gene serums: restore damaged genes, break finished serums back down into their components, and produce the specialised serums tied to individual genes.

li.xpath: Defs//researchPrerequisites/li[.="WVC_XenotypesAndGenes_SerumLab" or .="WVC_XenotypesAndGenes_DustogenicFood" or .="WVC_XenotypesAndGenes_NutrientsInjector" or .="WVC_XenotypesAndGenes_GeneRestoration" or .="WVC_XenotypesAndGenes_DisassembleSerum" or .="WVC_XenotypesAndGenes_RetuneSerum" or .="WVC_XenotypesAndGenes_XenotypeSerumCrafting" or .="WVC_XenotypesAndGenes_XenotypeResurrectorSerumCrafting"]

match.xpath: Defs//researchPrerequisites/li[.="WVC_XenotypesAndGenes_SerumLab" or .="WVC_XenotypesAndGenes_DustogenicFood" or .="WVC_XenotypesAndGenes_NutrientsInjector" or .="WVC_XenotypesAndGenes_GeneRestoration" or .="WVC_XenotypesAndGenes_DisassembleSerum" or .="WVC_XenotypesAndGenes_RetuneSerum" or .="WVC_XenotypesAndGenes_XenotypeSerumCrafting" or .="WVC_XenotypesAndGenes_XenotypeResurrectorSerumCrafting"]
